# ExtractVibe
> Extract comprehensive brand kits from any website — logos, colors, typography, voice, personality, and rules.

## Overview
ExtractVibe is an open-source brand intelligence engine that extracts comprehensive brand identity information from any website. It goes beyond simple logo and color detection to analyze brand voice, personality, typography, visual patterns, and design rules.

## Key Features
- **Deep Visual Identity**: Extracts logos, color palettes, gradients, spacing patterns, and visual hierarchy from any website.
- **Brand Voice Analysis**: Uses AI to analyze copy and content to determine brand tone, voice, and communication style.
- **Typography Detection**: Identifies font families, weights, sizes, and typographic hierarchy.
- **Brand Rules**: Generates inferred brand guidelines including do's and don'ts for brand usage.
- **Vibe Synthesis**: Creates a holistic brand personality profile combining visual and verbal identity elements.
- **Multi-Format Export**: Export brand kits as JSON, PDF, or structured data for use in design tools and AI workflows.

## API
ExtractVibe provides a REST API for programmatic brand extraction:
- `POST /api/extract` — Start a new brand extraction job for a given URL
- `GET /api/extract/:id` — Get extraction results by job ID
- `GET /api/extract/history` — List past extractions

## Authentication
API authentication uses API keys passed via the `x-api-key` header. Manage your keys at https://extractvibe.com/dashboard/keys.

## Links
- Website: https://extractvibe.com
- API Docs: https://extractvibe.com/docs
- GitHub: https://github.com/extractvibe/extractvibe
